summary: Iteration 16 - Owner Dashboard (Phase 3) Testing Complete. All 9 backend tests passed (100%). All 7 Owner Dashboard tabs tested and working. KDS dismiss fix verified via code review. P0 regression verified - teste@teste.com returns 403 on delete.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 7 Owner Dashboard tabs working, KDS working)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Owner Dashboard (Phase 3) fully tested. All 7 sections (Overview, Performance, AI Insights, Finance & Risk, Growth & Loyalty, People & Ops, System & Expansion) are functional. KDS dismiss fix is implemented correctly using dismissedIds Set state. P0 user deletion protection continues to work - teste@teste.com returns 403 on delete.

features_tested.owner_dashboard: ✅ GET /api/owner/dashboard returns KPIs (revenue_today/mtd/ytd, growth_pct, estimated_profit, avg_ticket, arpu, retention_pct, total_guests_today, open_tabs, running_total, closed_today) and venues list
features_tested.owner_venues: ✅ GET /api/owner/venues returns venues with health status, revenue, tabs, guests, avg_ticket, voids, staff_count, top_items
features_tested.owner_insights: ✅ GET /api/owner/insights returns rule-based insights with situation/impact/suggestion fields (empty if no rules triggered)
features_tested.owner_finance: ✅ GET /api/owner/finance returns revenue_month, payments, voids_summary, risk_score
features_tested.owner_growth: ✅ GET /api/owner/growth returns new_guests, returning_guests, ltv, loyalty_members, guest_growth_pct
features_tested.owner_people: ✅ GET /api/owner/people returns total_staff and venues with staff_count
features_tested.owner_system: ✅ GET /api/owner/system returns system_status, uptime, venues_count, subscriptions
features_tested.frontend_owner_page: ✅ Owner page loads at /owner with 7 tabs in sidebar
features_tested.frontend_overview_tab: ✅ Overview tab shows revenue KPIs (Today, MTD, YTD, Profit), performance KPIs (Growth, ARPU, Retention, Guests), operational stats (Open Tabs, Closed, Avg Ticket), and venue cards
features_tested.frontend_performance_tab: ✅ Performance tab shows venue table with health badges and drill-down on click (showing Staff Active, Revenue, Avg Ticket, Guests, Top Items)
features_tested.frontend_insights_tab: ✅ AI Insights tab shows 'All Clear' when no issues detected (or insight cards with Situation/Impact/Suggestion format)
features_tested.frontend_finance_tab: ✅ Finance tab shows Revenue MTD, Risk Score, Payment Methods, Voids summary (count, amount, rate %)
features_tested.frontend_growth_tab: ✅ Growth tab shows New Guests, Returning, Guest Growth %, LTV, Guest Comparison bar, Loyalty Program stats
features_tested.frontend_people_tab: ✅ People tab shows Total Operational Staff and per-venue breakdown with recent shifts
features_tested.frontend_system_tab: ✅ System tab shows System Status (Operational), Uptime (99.9%), Active Venues, Webhook Status, Expansion info
features_tested.kds_dismiss_fix: ✅ KDS dismiss bug fix verified via code review - uses dismissedIds Set to prevent popup re-appearing for same order
features_tested.kds_page_working: ✅ KDS page (/kitchen) loads with 5 Kanban columns (Pending, Preparing, Ready, Delivered, Delayed), Kitchen/Bar filters work

api_endpoints_tested: GET /api/owner/dashboard - Returns KPIs and venues list
GET /api/owner/venues - Returns venues with health, revenue, staff, top_items
GET /api/owner/finance - Returns revenue, payments, voids, risk_score
GET /api/owner/growth - Returns guest metrics, LTV, loyalty stats
GET /api/owner/people - Returns total_staff and per-venue breakdown

kds_dismiss_fix_analysis.implementation: Uses dismissedIds useState(new Set()) to track dismissed ticket IDs. When dismiss is clicked, ticket ID is added to the Set. The delayed order check filters out tickets in dismissedIds Set, preventing re-display of dismissed popups.

key_lines.filtering: Line 214-215: const unDismissed = delayed.filter(t => !dismissedIds.has(t.id)); if (unDismissed.length > 0 && !delayedPopup) setDelayedPopup(unDismissed[0])
key_lines.dismiss_handler: Line 294: onClick={() => { setDismissedIds(prev => new Set(prev).add(delayedPopup.id)); setDelayedPopup(null); }}

kds_dismiss_fix_analysis.result: Fix is correctly implemented - popup will NOT reappear for the SAME dismissed order
